_doc: TEMPLATE: Copy this file to /sdcard/atak/tools/weather_sources/ and fill in your weather API details. Tap Refresh in the PARM tab to load.
_doc_sourceId: Unique identifier for this source. Use lowercase-kebab-case. Must not conflict with built-in IDs (open-meteo-gfs, open-meteo-ecmwf, open-meteo-dwd, aviation-weather-center).
_doc_displayName: Human-readable name shown in the source selector Spinner.
_doc_type: Source type: 'weather' for forecast/observation data, 'radar' for tile-based radar, 'both' for combined.

model._doc: Metadata about the weather model. Informational only, not used for API calls.
model.name: Model Name

auth._doc: Authentication config. type: 'none', 'api_key_header', 'api_key_query', 'bearer'. For API key, set headerName or queryParam and provide value.

rateLimit._doc: Rate limits for this API. Set null for unlimited.

endpoints._doc: Define API endpoints. Each key is a role: current, hourly, daily, windProfile, windProfilePressure, historical. Only define the ones your API supports.

current._doc_responsePath: JSON path to the data object in the API response (e.g., 'current', 'data.observations[0]'). Empty string for root.

fieldMapping._doc: Maps internal field names to API response field names. Internal names: temperature, humidity, apparentTemp, windSpeed, windDirection, windGusts, visibility, pressure, weatherCode, precipitation, cloudCover, isDay.

hourly._doc: Endpoint for hourly forecast data. Remove this block if not supported.
hourly._doc_timeField: Name of the time/timestamp array in the response.

daily._doc: Endpoint for daily forecast data. Remove this block if not supported.

unitConversions._doc: Client-side unit conversions as fallback. Each entry: { from, to, factor, offset }. result = value * factor + offset.

serverSideUnits._doc: If the API supports server-side unit conversion via query params, map unit systems here. Keys match queryParams names.

_doc_weatherCodeMapping: Optional map from API-specific weather codes to WMO codes. null if API uses WMO codes natively.

batch._doc: Batch/multi-location request support. Set supported: false if not available.

parameters._doc: Selectable parameters for each category. key = API parameter name, label = display text, unit = unit string, defaultOn = enabled by default.
